title: Surgeon Vacancy at Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!
